hikayeler.ozet: A happy apple on a green tree.
hikayeler.metin: Once upon a time, there was a little red apple on a big green tree. The sun was yellow and warm. A bird sang, "Good morning!" The apple smiled. It was a happy day.

hikayeler.ozet: A black cat plays in the garden.
hikayeler.metin: This is a black cat. Her name is Mimi. She likes to run and jump. She says, "Meow! Hello, friend!" Mimi is very happy today.

hikayeler.ozet: Ali plays with his blue ball.
hikayeler.metin: Ali has a blue ball. He throws the ball up. The ball goes high. Catch the ball! Ali laughs. "This is fun!" he says.
Good morning, sun! Good morning, sky! Elanaz opens her eyes. She washes her face. She eats breakfast. "Good morning, Mum!" she says.
One apple. Two books. Three pencils. Can and Zeynep count together. "One, two, three!" they say. Counting is easy and fun!
Look! A green frog sits on a leaf. It says, "Ribbit!" The frog can jump. Splash! It jumps into the water. The frog is happy.

hikayeler.ozet: Colors in the sky after rain.
hikayeler.metin: After the rain, the sky is blue. Look up! There is a rainbow. Red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple. "How beautiful!" says Ayşe.

hikayeler.ozet: A little duck in the pond.
hikayeler.metin: This is my yellow duck. It swims in the pond. Quack, quack! The duck is small and cute. I love my duck very much.

hikayeler.ozet: A friendly bear in the forest.
hikayeler.metin: In the forest lives a brown bear. The bear is big but kind. "Hello!" says the bear. The children are not afraid. They wave hello.
In the garden there are pink flowers. They smell sweet. Bees visit the flowers. "Wow, so pretty!" says the teacher. The children draw the flowers.
Hello! Hi! Two friends meet at the school gate. "How are you?" "I am fine, thank you!" They walk to class together. Friends are wonderful.
This is my family. My mother is kind. My father is tall. I have a sister and a baby brother. We love each other. Family is special.
We go to school every day. The teacher says, "Good morning, class!" We open our books. We read and write. School is a happy place.

hikayeler.ozet: A balloon flies in the park.
hikayeler.metin: Berk has a red balloon. The wind blows. The balloon goes up, up, up! "Come back!" says Berk. His friend helps. They catch the balloon. Hooray!
It is night. The moon is bright. Look at the stars! One star, two stars, three stars. Can you count more? Good night, stars. Sweet dreams!

hikayeler.ozet: An orange cat and an orange.
hikayeler.metin: The orange cat sits near an orange tree. The cat is sleepy. The oranges are round and orange. "Meow," says the cat. It is a lazy, sunny afternoon.
It is a rainy day. We cannot play outside. We play games inside. We read books. We draw pictures. Rainy days can be fun too!
I have a pet dog. His name is Max. Max can run fast. He wags his tail. "Good dog!" I say. Max is my best friend.
A white rabbit hops in the meadow. Hop, hop, hop! The rabbit has long ears. It eats a carrot. "Hello, little rabbit!" says Elanaz softly.
Let us play outside! We run. We jump. We play ball. The sun is warm. "This is great!" we shout. Playing outside makes us happy and strong.
The moon is in the sky. It is time for bed. "Good night, moon. Good night, stars. Good night, Mum and Dad." Elanaz closes her eyes. Sleep well.
This is my classroom. There is a board and desks. I have a pencil and a book. The window is open. I like my classroom very much.
A little bird sits in the nest. It is afraid to fly. Mother bird says, "You can do it!" The bird spreads its wings. Fly, fly, fly! The bird is brave.

hikayeler.ozet: A family picnic in the park.
hikayeler.metin: It is a sunny day. The family has a picnic. They eat sandwiches and fruit. They sit on a blanket. "What a lovely day!" says Dad. Everyone smiles.
This is my sister. Her name is Zeynep. She is kind and funny. We play together. We share our toys. I love my sister.

hikayeler.ozet: A tall tree in the garden.
hikayeler.metin: In the garden there is a big tree. It is brown and tall. Birds live in the tree. We sit under the tree. The tree gives us shade. Thank you, tree!
The wind is strong today. Ali flies a pink kite. Up goes the kite! Higher and higher! "Look at my kite!" Ali shouts. Flying a kite is exciting.
Today is my birthday! Happy birthday to me! There is a cake with candles. One, two, three — blow! My friends sing. "Thank you, everyone!" I say.
On the vine hang purple grapes. They are sweet and juicy. "Yum!" says Can. He shares grapes with his friend. Sharing is nice.
School is over. "Goodbye, teacher!" "Goodbye, friends!" "See you tomorrow!" The children go home. They had a good day. Tomorrow will be fun too.
